dailyNews.description: Shehbaz Sharif posted a ‘draft’ version of a message on the Iran-US ceasefire that was briefly posted on X before being edited, setting off a wave of online scrutiny.

dailyNews.title: Israel issues new evacuation order for southern Lebanon, signals continued strikes despite ceasefire push
dailyNews.description: Israel’s military has issued fresh evacuation warnings to residents of Tyre in southern Lebanon, underscoring deep uncertainty over the scope of the proposed Iran-US ceasefire and raising fears that the parallel conflict with Hezbollah will continue unabated.

dailyNews.title: DMK’s KS Ravinchandran calls TVK a ‘toddler party’ at Pulinthope rally
dailyNews.description: Leaders and cadres from alliance partners, including the Congress, Makkal Needhi Maiam (MNM), and the CPI, were also present during the campaign.

dailyNews.title: ‘Bow down’: Iran posts provocative photo of Donald Trump kneeling before Persian king; Internet goes wild
dailyNews.description: The Iranian Embassy shared a provocative image of Trump kneeling before a Persian king, asserting Iran's historical significance amid tensions.

dailyNews.title: ‘Self-styled Vishwaguru exposed’: Congress targets PM Modi after Pakistan helps broker US-Iran ceasefire
dailyNews.description: The Congress party said “the self-styled Vishwaguru stands thoroughly exposed”, hours after Pakistan announced hosting talks between the US and Iran.

dailyNews.title: Strait of Hormuz reopens under Ceasefire, but 800+ ships remain stranded amid uncertainty
dailyNews.description: Shipowners are rushing to understand the fine print of a US-Iran ceasefire that could temporarily unblock the Strait of Hormuz and open an exit for more than 800 vessels trapped in the Persian Gulf.

dailyNews.title: Quote of the Day by Henry Ford: 'Whether you think you can or you think you can't — you're right'
dailyNews.description: Henry Ford, an American industrialist and founder of the Ford Motor Company, believed that belief does not magically create results, but it strongly shapes behaviour. He said, confidence does not replace skill, capital, or execution, but it influences whether those things ever get fully used.

dailyNews.title: Will Iran levy Strait of Hormuz $2 million toll on tankers? Here's what we know
dailyNews.description: Buried inside the US-Iran ceasefire agreement is a little-noticed but potentially transformative financial arrangement - one that would see Iran charge every ship transiting the world's most critical oil chokepoint.

dailyNews.description: Amid the war with Iran, the president has proposed to scale back some of the very programs meant to ease families’ financial burdens.

dailyNews.title: Only Trump Knows Why Bondi Was Fired as Attorney General, Blanche Says
dailyNews.description: In his first news conference since being elevated to acting attorney general, Todd Blanche said that “nobody has any idea” what led to Pam Bondi’s dismissal other than President Trump.

dailyNews.title: ‘D.E.I.’ Was Erased From N.Y.C. Racial Equity Plan to Avoid Conflict With Trump
dailyNews.description: The changes came as President Trump has moved to erase diversity, equity and inclusion efforts. A Justice Department official still said the report seemed “fishy/illegal.”

dailyNews.title: Late Night Puzzles Over Trump’s ‘Mixed Message’ on Iran
dailyNews.description: “Everyone, most notably the people of Iran, were wondering if their civilization was going to die tonight. Well, good news, it didn’t,” Jimmy Kimmel said after a cease-fire was announced.

dailyNews.title: Trump admin. personnel agency is asking for federal workers' medical records
dailyNews.description: The Office of Personnel Management is asking insurers that cover federal employees and retirees to hand over details about their medical visits, their pharmacy claims, and more.

dailyNews.title: U.S. and Iran reach ceasefire deal, launching 2-week diplomatic push
dailyNews.description: President Trump announced that the U.S. and Iran had agreed to a two-week ceasefire that was contingent on the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Trump announces "double sided ceasefire" with Iran, says Strait of Hormuz must reopen
dailyNews.description: President Trump said​ he has agreed to a "double sided CEASEFIRE" with Iran, less than two hours before his deadline for Iran to either cut a deal with the U.S. or face massive strikes on its power plants.

dailyNews.title: Few Republicans condemn Trump's Iran threat, Democrats call for removal
dailyNews.description: Republicans in Congress largely stayed silent, while dozens of Democrats called for President Trump to be removed from office after he threatened "a whole civilization will die tonight."

dailyNews.title: Details on Iran's 10-point proposal at center of 2-week ceasefire
dailyNews.description: President Trump has announced that he will suspend attacks on Iran for two weeks. CBS News' Imtiaz Tyab, Courtney Kealy and Aaron MacLean have the latest.

dailyNews.title: Breaking down Trump's ceasefire announcement with Iran
dailyNews.description: President Trump on Tuesday announced a two-week ceasefire with Iran. CBS News' Aaron MacLean has more.

dailyNews.title: Martin Van Buren's rocky term as president
dailyNews.description: Colleen Shogan, the former archivist of the U.S. whom President Trump fired early in his second term, is now leading the "In Pursuit" essay series, which honors presidents and first ladies ahead of America's 250th anniversary. Shogan joins "The Takeout" to discuss the latest works from the project, including an essay on President Martin Van Buren, and more.

dailyNews.title: H.R. McMaster on Iran ceasefire: "We'll see what happens"
dailyNews.description: President Trump has announced a 2-week ceasefire with Iran. Mr. Trump's former national security adviser, H.R. McMaster, joined CBS News with his reaction.
